telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 28, 2026 Markets reflected a stagflationary regime shift as geopolitical tensions and crypto capitulation drove broad risk-off sentiment. Bitcoin's 25% Q1 plunge amid ETF outflows cascaded into equities while elevated VIX signaled heightened uncertainty. The dollar's strength and oil's resilience underscored inflationary pressures persisting despite growth concerns. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $66,934 · ETH: $2,023 · SOL: $83.38 · GOLD: $4,516 · SPY: $634.09 (-3.5%) · QQQ: $562.58 (-4.3%) · VIX: $31.05 (+13.2%) · TLT: $85.64 (-1.4%) · DXY: $100.19 (+0.3%) · OIL: $99.64
